rule_name: Potential Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) Detection
description: Detects a single source IP enumerating an abnormally high number of unique user profile paths within a short timeframe, indicating broken access control.
search_query: index=web sourcetype=access_combined uri_path="/api/users/*" | stats dc(uri_path) as distinct_profiles values(uri_path) as accessed_profiles by src_ip | where distinct_profiles > 20
